# Community context (anonymised export)

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by src/context/export.ts (issue #53). Do not hand-edit. -->
<!-- Aggregate-only, k-floored, scrubbed. See docs/SECURITY.md ("Community-context export"). -->

_No export has been generated yet. The server keeps a fresh copy at the
untracked `CONTEXT_EXPORT_PATH` (default `var/community-context.md`, issue
#108) once `CONTEXT_BUILDER_ENABLED` + `CONTEXT_EXPORT_ENABLED` are on. To
refresh **this** file, run
`CONTEXT_EXPORT_PATH=docs/COMMUNITY-CONTEXT.md npm run export:context`
against the production database and commit the result — committing is a
deliberate human step; the bot never pushes._
